name: Noront Resources Ltd.
description: Noront Resources Ltd. was a Canada-based mining company primarily focused on the exploration and development of mineral properties in the Ring of Fire region of Northern Ontario. The company specialized in identifying and advancing projects rich in critical minerals, including nickel, copper, chromite, and platinum group metals, which are essential for a decarbonized future. Following its acquisition, the company's assets were integrated into Wyloo, a global mining company committed to producing critical materials for the green energy transition through sustainable extraction and processing practices in partnership with local and First Nation communities.
